approvalRule: Do not activate any real private pilot, private Decidim workspace, EOI intake, provider handoff, or second pilot until authority, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, privacy impact, role access, participant notice, private environment, and scale criteria are approved.
publicSafetyRule: This public v3.1 authority package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, or private pilot evidence.
noGoTriggers: Real intake opens before authority and data governance approval are recorded.
Developer custody or repository maintainership is treated as community authority.
Private pilot records enter GitHub Pages, public CSVs, public screenshots, public repo issues, or the fake Decidim sandbox.
Official Toastmasters records, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter forms are stored in the public package.
Consent, withdrawal, correction, retention, deletion, or incident response is missing or untested.
A provider or public reviewer receives real participant data before contract, authority, and privacy approval.
Scale or second pilot proceeds without closeout, redaction QA, and authority record.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics
OAIC Guide to undertaking privacy impact assessments

authorityGates.evidence: Named person or body can approve, hold, or stop real pilot activation
authorityGates.noGo: Real intake opens without accountable authority

authorityGates.evidence: Decision rights, consultation scope, and escalation route
authorityGates.noGo: Developer or repository maintainer becomes default authority

authorityGates.evidence: Purpose, participant group, exclusions, duration, and decision owner
authorityGates.noGo: Pilot collects data beyond approved purpose

authorityGates.evidence: What initial developer can maintain vs what community authority decides
authorityGates.noGo: Code custody is confused with First Nations authority

authorityGates.evidence: Official forms, payments, signatures, member numbers, and charter records stay outside public package
authorityGates.noGo: Official Toastmasters records enter public demo or public repository

authorityGates.evidence: Reviewer can approve data classes, storage, reporting, and deletion
authorityGates.noGo: Pilot starts without IDS review owner

authorityGates.evidence: Reviewer can approve notice, consent, correction, withdrawal, retention, and PIA
authorityGates.noGo: Privacy decisions are made ad hoc

authorityGates.gate: Cultural safety and incident reviewer named
authorityGates.evidence: Pause, escalation, participant support, and incident pathway
authorityGates.noGo: Incident or safety concern lacks authority to pause

authorityGates.evidence: Who approves consent text and withdrawal/correction handling
authorityGates.noGo: Old or unclear consent is reused

authorityGates.evidence: Who approves public-safe aggregate updates and redaction QA
authorityGates.noGo: Public report can identify private circumstances

authorityGates.evidence: Hosting, backups, access logs, admin roles, and support route decision
authorityGates.noGo: Static public demo becomes system of record

authorityGates.evidence: Access support, plain-language help, and response clocks
authorityGates.noGo: Participants cannot get help or withdraw safely

authorityGates.evidence: When to seek formal legal, privacy, or organisational advice
authorityGates.noGo: High-risk decision proceeds without advice route

authorityGates.evidence: Who can request quote, approve budget, and hold provider boundary
authorityGates.noGo: Provider is asked to handle real data before approval

authorityGates.evidence: Backup admin and operator handover path
authorityGates.noGo: Only one person can operate or close the pilot

authorityGates.evidence: Who decides repeat, scale, archive, no-go, or second pilot
authorityGates.noGo: Second pilot opens from momentum, not authority

authorityGates.evidence: Who can delete, retain, archive, or transfer records after pilot
Signed or recorded approval before real intake opens

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Why the pilot benefits First Nations participants and who can check that benefit
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Data collection serves platform learning more than community benefit

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Who can approve use, reuse, reporting, transfer, and deletion
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Data is reused because it is technically available

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Named duties for minimisation, access, quality, retention, and correction
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: No one owns data quality or care duties

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Participant dignity, cultural safety, and harm-prevention review before activation
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Pilot treats data as neutral admin material

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Every field has purpose, owner, retention, and deletion path
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Fields are added because they are easy to collect

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Member numbers, payments, official records, access needs, incidents, private contacts, authority records
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Never-public records appear in public evidence

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Workspace, hosting region, backup, admin access, and export path
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Records stored in public repo, GitHub Pages, or screenshots

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Role register with named access, expiry, and review date
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Supporters or public reviewers get private access

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Delete, retain, archive, handoff, review date, and evidence rule
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Records remain after pilot without reason

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Participant can request correction or withdrawal through private route
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Withdrawal cannot be actioned before launch

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Small sample, identity inference, and public wording review
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Learning note identifies participants by context

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: When data can move to official route, provider, archive, or second pilot

dataGovernanceControls.control: Source and consent version register ready
dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Notice version, consent version, source, date, and owner
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Team cannot prove what notice applied

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Access logs, deletion evidence, approval records, and redaction QA
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: No proof exists after an incident or complaint

dataGovernanceControls.evidence: Which Decidim spaces/components may hold which private records
Review date, owner, evidence package, and deletion/retention action
dataGovernanceControls.noGo: Pilot ends without data governance closeout

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Plain purpose for each data class
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Purpose is vague or changes after collection

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: What is collected, why, where stored, who sees it, how to withdraw
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: People submit info without clear notice

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Consent is voluntary, specific, informed, and separate from official Toastmasters process
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Consent implies official membership or charter approval

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Fields are limited to pilot operation and support
Access needs, incidents, private contacts, cultural material, payment, member records
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Sensitive records are collected without justification

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Named admins, reviewers, support, no-private-access roles
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Unapproved people can view private records

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: MFA, password sharing ban, exports, backups, device risk
Delete, retain, transfer, archive, and review dates
Request route, owner, response clock, and proof
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: No way to correct or withdraw before launch

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Pause rule, notification route, containment, evidence
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Exposure has no pause or escalation route

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: What external service sees and what contract/control is needed
privacyImpactChecks.noGo: Provider receives real data during quote or setup

privacyImpactChecks.evidence: Where records, backups, logs, and subprocessors are located
Public wording checked for identity inference and private context
Recorded decision before real pilot activation

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Approve, hold, stop, and close pilot
roleAccessRegister.limit: No shared login; expiry after closeout

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Configure private workspace, access, backup, exports
roleAccessRegister.limit: No access to official Toastmasters payment/member systems

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Review notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, PIA
roleAccessRegister.limit: No public screenshots of private rows

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Handle pause, incident, support, cultural safety route
roleAccessRegister.limit: Access only when incident/support event needs review

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Manage official Toastmasters pathway outside public package
roleAccessRegister.limit: No official records stored in Governance Commons public files

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Support accessibility and participant help requests
roleAccessRegister.limit: Access limited to assigned support requests

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Check public pages, redaction, screenshots, release integrity
Quote or build against fake/sample data only
roleAccessRegister.limit: No real data before contract and authority approval

roleAccessRegister.allowed: Review governance model and public-safe summaries
Operate approved private Decidim workspace if chosen
roleAccessRegister.limit: No admin access without named approval

participantNoticeClauses.evidence: Plain-language purpose for controlled First Nations Toastmasters pilot
No one has to join the pilot to access public demo material
Official forms, payments, charter, and member records stay outside this package
Name/contact/status/support route only if approved privately
No payment, member number, official form, signature, incident detail, access need, or authority record in public demo
Named operators/reviewers only, no public reviewers or providers
Approved private workspace only, not GitHub Pages or public CSVs
Private contact route, response clock, and evidence rule
Delete, retain, archive, or transfer rule and review date

participantNoticeClauses.clause: What happens if something goes wrong
participantNoticeClauses.evidence: Pause, contain, contact, review, and no-go path
No names, private context, access needs, incidents, or official records
Proceed, hold, no-go, archive, or second pilot by authority record

activationPlan.noGo: GitHub Pages used for real records

activationPlan.evidence: Role, owner, access, expiry, review date
Minimum fields, notice, consent, withdrawal route

activationPlan.task: Map Decidim components to approved data classes

activationPlan.evidence: Drill screenshot or log stored privately
activationPlan.noGo: Team cannot delete or export safely
Real intake opens on draft notice
Official records enter private pilot tool accidentally

activationPlan.task: Run end-to-end dry run with fake data
activationPlan.evidence: Dry-run evidence across intake, access, withdrawal, delete, closeout

scaleCriteria.evidence: Data controls passed or named hold list
Privacy risks accepted, fixed, or no-go

scaleCriteria.noGo: Scale while support or incident route fails

scaleCriteria.criterion: Private hosting can sustain next stage
scaleCriteria.evidence: Access, backup, logging, deletion, admin continuity
scaleCriteria.noGo: Static demo or unstable private tool becomes system of record
Official membership data enters public/demo path

scaleCriteria.evidence: Budget, quote, or self-build capacity note
Founder readiness, support, conversion, withdrawals, operator load

scaleCriteria.noGo: Previous pilot remains open while next starts
